subcodes.first_line: O possessor of an illumined heart! Thy letter hath been received. Praise be to God that thou art a seeker after truth, and my hope is that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صاحب قلب نورانی نامه ات رسید الحمد لله حقیقت جو هستی و امیدم چنانست که
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
